2025 ICML 中稿论文分布与清单

  • 状态：available
  • 官方入口：https://openreview.net/group?id=ICML.cc/2025/Conference
  • 备注：OpenReview accepted submissions available.
  • 纳入论文数：3257

Distribution

领域 篇数 占比
LLM/NLP 482 14.8%
Computer Vision 369 11.3%
Multimodal 31 1.0%
Reinforcement Learning 251 7.7%
Robotics/Embodied AI 24 0.7%
Generative Models 217 6.7%
AI for Science 95 2.9%
ML Theory 216 6.6%
Optimization 176 5.4%
Trustworthy/Safety/Fairness 254 7.8%
Data/Training Systems 990 30.4%
Applications 150 4.6%
Other 2 0.1%
Total 3257 100.0%
